translated: This is amazing.
And those paper chains around her neck... I bet everyone made those
back in their school days.
Whenever there was a party, you'd put them up on the walls like that.
How nostalgic.
Are those loose socks she's wearing?
That's such a nice touch.
It gives off such gal vibes.
Oh, I almost forgot.
Here is the trained version.
Wow.
This is so good.
It's just... how do I put it?
It's packed with Rin-chan's charm.
I love that she's wearing a sleeveless top underneath.
And she's walking on... what do you call this?
The curb?
I love that she's walking right along the edge.
It's so Rin-chan.
It makes me want to say, "Don't go near the edge!"
I just want to tell her not to get hurt.
Loose socks really are cute, though.
Trends really do come back around in cycles.
She's seriously adorable.
And that ribbon is so cute too.
It suits her so well.
Sigh.
I'm literally sighing because she's just too cute.
Okay, let's move on to Shiho-chan.
Here is Shiho-chan's untrained card.
Seriously, thank you so much for this.
Thank you for drawing such a wonderful illustration.
I am so incredibly happy.
I'm so happy I could spin around!
I'm just so happy.
Wait a second.
I'm watching the YouTube comments, so seeing myself spin on the delay is making me really embarrassed.
That's so embarrassing.
So awkward, so awkward.
But isn't this great?
Look at this.
She's dozing off because she stayed up too late the night before.
Oh, she's so cute.
She's just so cute.
And look at the wall in the back. Are those photos from the autumn shuffle event?
I love that those are posted there.
Oh, I should be looking at this screen instead of the delay.
Yeah, this is really great.
I'm happy to get a detailed look at Shiho-chan's room like this,
and I love that you can see the soles of her feet.
Usually, characters are wearing shoes, right?
Or you just can't see their feet at all.
There's something nice about being able to see the soles of a 2D character's feet.
Wait, what am I even saying?
Am I a creep?
I feel like someone's going to scold me for that.
The staff is going to get mad at me.
They'll tell me, "Please don't look at things like that."
But honestly, if you didn't want me to look, you shouldn't have drawn them!
The chat is asking me what's wrong.
No, no, no.
My love for her is just overflowing.
And that's only the untrained version!
Let's take a look at the trained version too.
Oh, I went back by mistake.
Here is the trained version.
Nice.
She's so cute.
That varsity jacket really suits her.
And she's drinking something that looks like tea... is that apple tea, maybe?
It definitely looks like it.
She's actually drinking it.
Wow, I didn't know Shiho-chan drank apple tea.
That's the vibe I'm getting.
It's so good.
It looks like she's in front of a music store, which fits her character perfectly.
Also, Shiho-chan's character color is light green, right?
So isn't it great how it matches the green apple?
Ah, I love it.
Whoops, almost lost it there.
